summary: Excellent front‑of‑PA/matrix recording with a feisty Jack Straw performance despite some track mislabeling.
review: Both reviewers rave about the crystal‑clear sound that comes straight from the PA with virtually no audience bleed, making this an excellent listening experience. The show runs in its entirety (though some set labels are wrong) and features a particularly feisty rendition of Jack Straw. Minor tracking/mislabel issues are noted but do not detract from the overall quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews give 5‑star ratings, praising both musical performance and audio clarity; only minor labeling issues are mentioned.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Front‑of‑PA sound is crisp and up‑front with virtually no audience noise; however, track labeling is incorrect and some tracking glitches are present.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Set labels are mis‑matched but the full concert is present and flows well overall.
